meta.purpose: Complete portfolio data for saikattanti.dev — use this file to populate all sections via Antigravity
meta.instructions: Every key maps directly to a portfolio section. Use all fields as-is. Do not truncate any description.

personal.name: Saikat Tanti
personal.title: Full Stack Engineer & Co-Founder
personal.tagline: I build production-grade web and mobile applications end-to-end — from architecture and backend systems to frontend UX and deployment.
personal.short_bio: Full Stack Engineer & CSE student (B.Tech 2027, CGPA 7.9) with 2+ years building and shipping production applications. Co-Founder & Founding Engineer of Gyanoda App (1,000+ Play Store users). Lead Software Engineer at Zogiraa, a Bihar Government-funded workforce marketplace. Chairperson, FIEM ACM Student Chapter.
personal.long_bio: I am a Full Stack Software Engineer and CSE student (B.Tech 2027, CGPA 7.9) based in Kolkata, India, with 2+ years of hands-on experience building, shipping, and leading production-grade web and mobile applications. I co-founded Gyanoda — a React Native + Next.js EdTech platform now live on Google Play with 1,000+ installs. I currently serve as Lead Software Engineer at Zogiraa (Zomira World Pvt. Ltd.), a Bihar Government-funded workforce marketplace, where I designed the full system architecture and lead an 8-person engineering team across a polyrepo structure of 4 repositories. I am also Chairperson of the FIEM ACM Student Chapter and Lead Organizer of HackSpire, our annual hackathon with 200+ participants.
personal.availability: Open to Full Stack Developer, SDE Intern, and AI Engineer roles — remote or hybrid across India
personal.headline_160_chars: Full Stack Engineer · Co-Founder @ Gyanoda (1K+ Play Store) · Lead Engineer @ Zogiraa (Gov. Funded) · React · Next.js · Node.js · TypeScript | Open to SDE/Full Stack roles

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech) — Computer Science & Engineering
education.institution: Future Institute of Engineering and Management (FIEM)
education.status: Currently in 3rd year, entering 4th year July 2026

experience.title: Lead Software Engineer (Intern)
experience.role_summary: Architect and technical lead for a 5-component production workforce marketplace platform serving blue-collar workers and employers across Bihar.
responsibilities: Architected and led engineering for a 5-component workforce marketplace: React Native worker app, Next.js employer dashboard, Next.js admin panel, public landing site, and centralized Node.js/Express backend

Designed complete backend infrastructure: JWT + Bcrypt authentication, Fast2SMS OTP, Redis caching and rate-limiting, Socket.io real-time job notifications, Cashfree payment gateway for direct employer-to-worker wage transfers
Implemented Cloudflare DNS, DDoS protection, and SSL across all production domains; deployed on Vercel (frontend) and Render (backend)
Led a team of 8 engineers as primary technical decision-maker — reviewed all PRs, resolved critical bugs, drove all architecture decisions across 4 specialized repositories (polyrepo structure)
Resolved a critical Expo mobile app network failure by diagnosing dynamic IP routing conflicts and refactoring Axios client with strict 10-second timeout enforcement
platform_components: Worker Mobile App (React Native) — KYC, job applications, attendance tracking
Employer Dashboard (Next.js) — job posting, team hiring, payment processing
Admin Dashboard (Next.js) — KYC approvals, platform moderation
Landing Website — marketing and user acquisition
Backend API (Node.js/Express) — central server powering all components

experience.title: Co-Founder & Founding Engineer
experience.role_summary: Co-founded and engineered Gyanoda from zero to 1,000+ Google Play Store installs.
responsibilities: Co-founded Gyanoda from zero — designed architecture, led development, and shipped to Google Play Store with 1,000+ installs
Built cross-platform React Native app and Next.js website delivering WBJEE/NEET PYQ video solutions with subscription and freemium monetization via Razorpay
Designed scalable content delivery architecture, real-time data sync, Cloudinary media pipeline
Led a 5-person team across frontend, backend, and deployment

experience.title: App Developer (Freelance)
responsibilities: Developed and optimized front-end features, improving application performance and scalability
Enhanced user experience by streamlining workflows and improving UI responsiveness
Collaborated with core team to deliver key modules within defined timelines

projects.name: Zogiraa — Workforce Marketplace Platform
projects.tagline: Bihar Government-funded platform connecting blue-collar workers with verified employers
projects.role: Lead Software Engineer — Architect & Team Lead
projects.problem: Millions of blue-collar workers in Bihar had no reliable digital way to find verified jobs, track attendance, or receive secure payments. Employers had no way to hire vetted workers on demand.
projects.solution: A 5-component workforce marketplace ecosystem — worker app, employer dashboard, admin panel, landing site, and centralized backend — enabling digital job matching, KYC verification, attendance tracking, and direct wage payments.
key_features: 5-step worker onboarding with KYC document upload
Real-time job notifications via Socket.io
Direct employer-to-worker wage transfers via Cashfree
Redis-based API rate limiting and response caching
Cloudflare DDoS protection and SSL across all domains
Polyrepo architecture across 4 specialized repositories
projects.my_contributions: Designed entire system architecture. Implemented all backend systems. Led 8-person engineering team. Reviewed all PRs. Made all architecture decisions. Deployed all production environments.

projects.name: Gyanoda App
projects.tagline: EdTech app for WBJEE/NEET students — PYQs, mock tests, and video solutions
projects.problem: WBJEE and NEET students in West Bengal lacked a focused, affordable platform for previous year question solutions and structured exam preparation.
projects.solution: Cross-platform mobile app and web platform delivering PYQ video solutions, mock tests, and guided learning with freemium and subscription monetization.
key_features: Previous year question video solutions
Mock tests with performance tracking
Freemium and subscription content model
Razorpay payment integration for premium content
Scalable content delivery architecture

projects.name: ShopSpire — E-Commerce Platform
projects.tagline: Production-ready merchandise platform for FIEM ACM Student Chapter
projects.problem: FIEM ACM Student Chapter needed a production-ready platform to sell official merchandise with proper inventory management, payment processing, and order tracking.
projects.solution: Full-stack e-commerce platform with customer storefront, admin dashboard, Razorpay payments, PostgreSQL database, and complete order management system.
key_features: Product catalog with inventory management
Shopping cart and order management
Razorpay payment gateway integration
Email verification via Nodemailer SMTP
Separate admin dashboard (Appwrite backend) for product and order management
ImageKit CDN for image optimization
Analytics dashboard with Recharts
NextAuth + JWT authentication
projects.my_contributions: Designed and built the entire system solo — storefront, backend, database schema, payment workflow, email automation, and admin dashboard.

projects.name: Fyn — AI-Powered Expense Manager
projects.tagline: Privacy-first Android expense tracker that auto-detects bank SMS and payment notifications
projects.problem: Existing expense trackers require manual entry or store personal SMS messages on cloud servers, creating privacy risks.
projects.solution: Privacy-first expense manager that automatically detects bank SMS and UPI payment notifications on-device using Android BroadcastReceiver, processes them with on-device NLP, and syncs only structured metadata to the backend — no personal messages ever leave the phone.
key_features: Auto-detection of bank SMS (SMS_RECEIVED BroadcastReceiver)
UPI app notification capture (Google Pay, PhonePe, Paytm, WhatsApp Pay)
On-device ML transaction classification — no raw messages sent to server
WorkManager background sync of structured metadata only
Historical SMS import with READ_SMS permission
Real-time expense dashboard with budgeting and analytics
Privacy-first architecture — amount, merchant, category, timestamp only
projects.privacy_architecture: All ML inference runs locally on the Android device. Personal messages are never uploaded. Only structured metadata (amount, merchant name, category, timestamp) is synced to backend.

projects.name: Real-Time Scam & Spam Detection System
projects.tagline: Multimodal AI fraud detector using transformer-based NLP — ~90% F1 score
projects.certification: Completed as part of Ardent Computech Industrial Internship & Training — AI, ML, Deep Learning & Generative AI with Python (NASSCOM / IT-ITeS SSC Accredited)
projects.problem: Existing spam filters are text-only and keyword-based, missing sophisticated phishing attempts that use images, QR codes, and URLs.
projects.solution: Multimodal fraud detection pipeline processing text, emails, URLs, QR codes, and screenshots through OCR + transformer-based NLP classifiers.
key_features: Multimodal input: text, emails, URLs, QR codes, and screenshots
EasyOCR pipeline extracts text from images for NLP analysis
DistilBERT/DeBERTa transformer classifiers for fraud detection
Real-time fraud risk scoring with category classification
Actionable user recommendations for each detected scam type
FastAPI deployment for live web application

metrics.dataset: Publicly available phishing and scam datasets

projects.name: Resume Analyzer & ATS Scoring Tool
projects.tagline: LLM-powered semantic ATS evaluation using GPT-4o and Claude 3.5 Sonnet
projects.problem: Existing ATS tools use keyword-matching which misses semantic alignment between resumes and job descriptions.
projects.solution: LLM-powered platform integrating GPT-4o and Claude 3.5 Sonnet for contextual resume-job description matching, category-wise scoring, and structured improvement suggestions.
key_features: Semantic ATS evaluation — not keyword matching
GPT-4o and Claude 3.5 Sonnet via Puter AI SDK
Category-wise scoring: skills match, experience alignment, formatting, ATS readiness
Structured improvement suggestions per category
Validated on 100+ real and sample resumes

projects.name: Trustless — Decentralized Escrow Marketplace
projects.tagline: Blockchain-based escrow platform for cross-border B2B transactions on Stellar
projects.problem: Cross-border B2B transactions and freelancer milestone payments lack a trustless, decentralized mechanism — existing solutions require third-party intermediaries.
projects.solution: Decentralized escrow marketplace on the Stellar blockchain using Soroban smart contracts for trustless fund release, on-chain dispute resolution, and USDC/XLM payment rails.
key_features: Soroban smart contract-based trustless escrow
Cross-border B2B transaction support
USDC and XLM payment rails
Decentralized on-chain dispute resolution
Premium frontend with GSAP scroll animations and Three.js particle effects
Interactive bento layouts and immersive scrolling

projects.name: HackSpire Platform
projects.tagline: Hackathon management platform for FIEM ACM's annual flagship event
key_features: Team registration and formation system
Participant management and leaderboards
Event operations and scheduling
Community engagement tools
200+ participants across HackSpire 2025 and 2026
